event: Portrait of a jovial man drinking
description: A half-length portrait of a smiling man wearing a large black wide-brimmed hat and a brown doublet with a white ruff collar. He holds a glass of beer or ale in his left hand and gestures outward with his raised right hand, fingers spread, as if in mid-speech or toast. His expression is one of merry amusement, with a curled mustache and goatee. A belt with a medallion crosses his waist. The background is neutral and warm-toned.
